items.caption: There are two individuals standing in front of a white truck with a black stripe. the truck is parked on a street with a clear sky above. the individuals are wearing red jackets and khaki pants, and they are holding what appears to be pest control equipment. the truck has the text "dr death pest control" visible on its side, indicating the company they represent. the background shows a residential area with houses and a fence. the overall scene suggests that these individuals are pest control professionals at work.
